metadata.name: Division
metadata.value: Advertising

metadata.name: Employment Type
metadata.value: Full-time

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
Excited about turning data into impact? Advertising is one of the fastest moving parts of our business, and we’re seeking a sharp mind to help push it further.
Join our Ad Monetization team and turn data into revenue—owning experiments, insights, and strategies that shape the future of our ad business. As a Business Analyst, you will work across teams to optimize systems, design A/B tests, and translate data into decisions that drive growth.

Your mission is to maximize revenue by combining analytical expertise, technical understanding, and strong business acumen. If that’s a mission you want to accept, then take this opportunity to make your mark.

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Perform data monitoring and analyses to support decision-making, including gathering requirements, preparing datasets, interpreting results, and communicating insights.
- Collaborate on AB testing, including planning, creating test setup, monitoring performance during the tests, and preparing post-test reports and recommendations to support evidence-based decisions.
- Design, develop, and maintain monitoring tools, dashboards, and reports to track key performance indicators and business metrics.
- Collaborate with different teams to align outcomes and process improvements with strategic business goals.
- Coordinate and support cross-functional projects, ensuring alignment between sales, tech, and analytical teams.
- Actively contribute to the development and refinement of business strategies aimed at revenue growth and improved operational performance.
- Challenge existing workflows and procedures with a continuous improvement mindset, using data to support change initiatives.
- Stay up to date with internal tools, systems, and data sources to remain effective in analysis, monitoring, and coordination efforts.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- An analytical & technical mindset and excellent attention to detail.
- Strong analytical and technical mindset with the ability to work with large datasets, interpret trends, and translate complex data into simple, actionable insights.
- Good business sense.
- Ability to work in a fast-paced environment - comfortable working in a dynamic environment with shifting priorities.
- Ability to work with different teams (Analytics team, BE, Adtech, QA). 
- Positive, make-it-happen, lead-by-example attitude.
- Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively as part of a team.
- Strong communication skills, with fluency in the English language (both written and spoken).

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- 3+ years of experience in data analysis or roles with a strong focus on working with data to support business decisions.
- Experience working with cross-functional teams, including technical and analytical departments.
- Experience with leading/ in managing projects across multiple departments.
- Hands-on experience with data analysis, reporting, and performance monitoring.
- Proficiency with data-oriented/BI tools like  Excel, Tableau, Power BI.
- Experience with SQL is a plus.
- Knowledge of the advertising industry is a plus.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Employment relationship with Ekipa2 d.o.o. for an indefinite period of time, with a six-month probationary period.
- Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
- Participation in attractive projects.
- Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences.
- Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
- Healthy meals in the office.
- Flexible working hours.
- 24 days of paid vacation.
- Participation in a discretionary bonus plan.
- Christmas bonus (subject to internal policies).

metadata.name: Publish - SLO Title (Recruiter)
metadata.value: Strokovnjak za oglasno platformo III / Ad Platform Expert (M/Ž)

metadata.value: Zahtevane so izkušnje iz področja podatkovne analitike. Sklenitev delovnega razmerja nudimo za nedoločen delovni čas s šestmesečnim poskusnim delom v podjetju Ekipa2 d.o.o., s sedežem v Ljubljani. Rok za prijavo: 30.3.2026.

metadata.name: Job category (area)
metadata.value: Sales & Business Development

metadata.name: Recuiter to display
metadata.value: Neja Rozman

metadata.name: Division
metadata.value: Talking Tom and Friends

metadata.name: Employment Type
metadata.value: Full-time

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value: We’re looking for a Chief Product Officer (CPO) to lead the next era of Outfit7’s growth. You’ll connect creativity with strategy, transforming ideas into world-class products that delight players and define what’s next in mobile entertainment.

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Define and lead the company’s products vision, strategy and goals, ensuring alignment with long-term business objectives.
- Oversee all games in Talking Tom and Friends product line, and other company games and entertainment directions, and roadmaps, managing cross-functional collaboration across design, development, marketing, data and operations.
- Supervise company-wide priorities, budgets and delivery processes, turning the vision into achievable plans.
- Lead and mentor senior managers and key roles, supporting their growth and empowering high-performing teams.
- Recognise and initiate strategic opportunities that move the company forward.
- Make and stand behind the most difficult decisions, communicating the “why” with clarity and confidence.
- Inspire others to share and live the company vision — keeping teams motivated, aligned, and connected.
- Anticipate risks and scenarios, lead through uncertainty with calm and clarity.
- Ensure that every product we deliver reflects the quality, creativity, and spirit that define Outfit7.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Excellent communication and leadership skills, with the ability to inspire at every level of the organisation.
- Strong strategic and analytical thinking — you see the whole business, not just the product.
- Deep understanding of product development, live operations, growth metrics and market dynamics.
- A growth mindset: proactive, adaptable, and focused on long-term success.
- Ability to make and own tough decisions — and to bring people with you.
- Passion for games, entertainment, and creating experiences that delight millions.
- Fluency in English (written & spoken).

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Proven track record in a C-level or senior product executive role (e.g., CPO, VP of Product) — in the gaming or digital entertainment industry.
- Proven gaming industry experience: understanding of hybrid casual and casual games.
- Success leading teams through critical phases, reversing negative trends, and/or driving growth or product recovery.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Employment relationship with Outfit7 Limited for an indefinite period of time, with a six-month probationary period.
- Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
- Participation in attractive projects.
- Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences.
- Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
- Healthy meals in the office.
- Flexible working hours.
- 24 days of paid vacation.
- Participation in a discretionary bonus plan.
- Christmas bonus (subject to internal company policies).

metadata.name: Job category (area)
metadata.value: Product & Production

metadata.name: Recuiter to display
metadata.value: Tetiana Nevmerzhytska

metadata.name: Division
metadata.value: Entertainment

metadata.name: Employment Type
metadata.value: Student

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
Have you worked with digital platforms in the video content and entertainment industries? Then we want to hear from you.
We’re looking for someone to provide operational support and oversee our self-managed digital platforms. A skilled team player with great communication skills. And someone who’s got an eagle eye for detail, as well as a keen sense of market trends.

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Run the team’s day-to-day operational tasks across multiple self-managed digital platforms, such as Youtube, etc.
- Manage content schedules and track content production to ensure deadlines are met.
- Be operationally responsible for content publishing on different digital platforms.
- Handle channel management - (playlist editing, channel’s visual look, etc.)
- Create basic performance updates for the wider team and the company.
- Participate in meetings with internal and external stakeholders to present channel activities and performance.
- Coordinate with other departments (Design, Marketing, Localization, etc.) in order to ensure all necessary video materials are provided for publishing across different digital platforms.
- Keep up to date with platform developments and trends, as well as Outfit7’s gaming developments and training opportunities.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Highly organized approach and excellent time management.
- Ability to prioritize and meet critical deadlines.
- Proactive working style, with an eagerness to learn.
- Basic understanding of different media distribution systems (AVOD) and their practices.
- Ability to think critically and analytically to solve problems.
- Strong communication skills, with fluency in the English language (both written and spoken).

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- 1+ year of experience in the marketing or digital industries is preferred but not required.
- Background working with D2C platforms (YouTube, Facebook Watch, Amazon Prime, Instagram TV, etc) is preferred but not required.
- Experience working in the entertainment industry is preferred but not required.
- Experience with the monetization of content on video platforms is a bonus.
- Valid student status.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Student cooperation agreement with Ekipa2 d.o.o. (an Outfit7 subsidiary)
- Diverse work with exciting challenges, working in a fun, relaxed environment.
- The opportunity to obtain valuable experience through temporary and occasional work.
- Participation in attractive projects.

metadata.name: Publish - SLO Title (Recruiter)
metadata.value: Koordinator za video platforme (študentsko delo) (Ž/M)

metadata.name: Publish - SLO Descritpion (Recruiter)
metadata.value: Si študent in se želiš preizkusiti in sodelovati pri razvoju priljubljenih Outfit7 iger, s katerimi se zabava več kot 470 milijonov uporabnikov mesečno? V kolikor te to zanima, nam pošlji prijavo s svojim življenjepisom. Rok za prijavo: 30.3.2026

metadata.name: Job category (area)
metadata.value: Marketing & Publishing

metadata.name: Recuiter to display
metadata.value: Neja Rozman

metadata.name: Division
metadata.value: PlayValley

metadata.name: Employment Type
metadata.value: Full-time

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
The mission of a new IP division within Outfit7, called PlayValley, is creating new IPs through rapid prototyping and bold experimentation.
We are looking for a Growth Product Manager with a passion for gaming and a deep curiosity for data. In this role, you will connect the dots between user acquisition funnels and in-game metrics, turning raw data from casual game prototypes into actionable insights. You’ll evaluate  whether a game has real potential, explain why, and guide changes to UA campaigns, audiences, channels, and even in-game features to enhance growth.
You will be the bridge between creative prototypes and UA execution, ensuring high-quality traffic reaches games that engage and retain players. This is a role for someone motivated, analytical, and excited to shape the growth of a casual gaming portfolio.

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Provide the technical instructions for theUA team. You’ll be the one to spot when a campaign is wasting money on low-quality placements and propose the most viable course of action.
- Handle the data side of early market validation tests. You'll set up the tracking, monitor the results, and report back on whether a casual game prototype has the prospect to scale.
- Identify Funnel Leaks - in case of a gap between the games, countries, audiences, you are the one who digs into the cohorts. You’ll find out if it's a technical bug, a targeting mismatch, or a game issue.
- Be the link between ads and in-game metrics. You’ll build the reporting that proves which specific ad creatives are bringing in players who actually play, which indicators show potential, and why cohorts perform differently.
- Push the UA team to move beyond "cheap clicks" and vanity CPIs. You’ll guide them toward building a profitable product and find players who actually fit the casual game mechanics at hand.
- Collaborate with Distribution and Product teams to identify opportunities to improve distribution.
- Develop robust experimentation frameworks and perform analyses to support profit growth and distribution optimization.
- Advise the Marketing team on test design and experimental setups based on data insights.
- Analyze results from various experiments and tests.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Being able to make decisions based on data and measurable results rather than intuition or opinion.
- Having the ability to optimize growth funnels and acquisition strategies for profitability, focusing on finding high-quality, engaged players.
- Understanding advertising algorithms deeply and knowing which levers to pull to improve campaign performance and efficiency.
- Demonstrating analytical objectivity and the confidence to recommend ending a project or prototype that doesn’t meet market validation benchmarks.
- Possessing expertise in casual gaming and knowing performance benchmarks for casual and puzzle titles.
- Being able to distinguish between high-volume hyper-casual traffic and high-retention casual audiences and act based on these insights.
- Communicating complex findings clearly and effectively to various audiences, including company leadership, using actionable insights.
- Structuring complex analyses into coherent frameworks and translating large datasets into practical, data-driven recommendations.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- 3+ years of hands-on experience in mobile gaming analytics or growth, with advanced skills in SQL and querying BigQuery independently.
- Highly proficient with analytics and visualization tools such as Firebase, Tableau, Looker Studio, and advertising dashboards like Meta and AppLovin.
- Possessing deep, practical experience with MMPs, particularly Singular, and knowing how to map users to in-game milestones.
- Having a proven track record in running the data side of soft launches or market validation tests for casual games and helping titles scale from prototype to global launch.
- Being familiar with UA execution, including extensive experience in Meta Ads Manager and other advertising tools, and understanding the trade-offs between broad targeting, ROAS optimization, and targeted campaigns.
- Having strong auction and market intelligence, including knowledge of CPM and CPI variations across regions and genres, and the ability to adjust testing budgets to determine true retention floors in competitive markets.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Employment relationship with a legal entity within Outfit7 group for an indefinite period of time, with a six-month probationary period.
- Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
- Participation in attractive projects.
- Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences
- Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
- Healthy meals in the office
- Flexible working hours
- 24 days of paid vacation
- Participation in a discretionary bonus plan.
- Christmas bonus (subject to internal policies).
- We are open to exploring remote work possibilities, subject to the specifics of the candidate's location and preferences.

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
The licensing partners we manage operate on a global scale, and we’re looking for someone to help us coordinate them - all while learning a whole lot along the way.
You’ll be handling clients, supporting business development, searching for opportunities, and helping with licensing operations even further. And through all of this you’ll gain hands-on experience in licensing business models, consumer product licensing, media content sales, IP (intellectual property) protection, sustainable practices, media content positioning, and much more.
This is a great first-step opportunity, so don’t miss out - get in touch now!

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Coordinate clients.
- Research key customer wants and needs, and propose how to meet them.
- Gather and create reports and monthly overviews, and handle reporting systems.
- Operate licensing management tools (product approvals, accounts, and assets library).
- Cooperate with different teams, including the design team for style guide implementation, the legal team for IP protection and legal documentation, as well as other teams, such as content, localisation, and communications team for various licensing-related operations.
- Handle documentation, data entry, and support account management.
- Collect client feedback and share it internally with the relevant departments, as well as suggest improvements.
- Help prepare pitches and other promotional/sales materials.
- Support and follow partners’ promotional activities, and assist in coordination between partners and our marketing department.
- Participate at events and engage in PR activities throughout the year.
- Keep abreast of industry best practices and market trends.
- Provide operational support to the business development team.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Strong team player, with great communication skills.
- Excellent organizational and time management skills, with first-rate attention to detail.
- Ability to prioritize and meet critical deadlines.
- Logical and solution-oriented approach to tasks.
- Positive, open-minded attitude.
- Fluency in the English language (both written and spoken), with additional languages a major asset, but not essential.
- Capacity to learn about brand guidelines and style manuals, as well as legal agreements and IP protection “modus operandi.”
- Passion for business development, branding, design, video media content, and the entertainment industry as a whole.
- General understanding of the production processes behind physical goods and video media content.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Knowledge of and experience in the licensing and/or entertainment industry is preferred but not required.
- Valid student status.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Student cooperation agreement with Ekipa2 d.o.o. (an Outfit7 subsidiary)
- Diverse work with exciting challenges, working in a fun, relaxed environment.
- The opportunity to obtain valuable experience through temporary and occasional work.
- Participation in attractive projects.

metadata.name: Job category (area)
metadata.value: Sales & Business Development

metadata.name: Recuiter to display
metadata.value: Neja Rozman

metadata.name: Division
metadata.value: Talking Tom and Friends

metadata.name: Employment Type
metadata.value: Full-time

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
Do you want to work with a talented team developing mobile games?

Then you might be the experienced game developer we’re looking for to help us maintain and further improve the portfolio of award-winning games like My Talking Angela 2, My Talking Tom 2 and My Talking Tom Friends 2. In addition, you will eventually work on developing new games across the franchise. Our ideal candidate will cover everything from delving deep into game and engine code to implementing new features; all with a proactive, lead-by-example attitude.

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Plan and implement most complex game features and components for live mobile games using in-house Starlite game engine written in C++ and Unity game engine (depends on department needs during onboarding phase).
- Collaborate, communicate, and work efficiently as part of the multidisciplinary team, and across various other departments and the Starlite engine team to address most important technical challenges of high business value.
- Maintain and improve game code, libraries and tools for artists and designers.
- Share knowledge, mentor engineers and drive projects and workflow improvements across the whole department.
- Learn more about Starlite game engine from Outfit7 Tech Blog:  Building the - Ultimate Mobile Game Engine: Starlite https://outfit7.com/blog/tech/building-the-ultimate-mobile-game-engine-starlite

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Good communication and interpersonal skills, with fluency in the English language (both written and spoken).
- Positive, make-it-happen, lead-by-example attitude.
- Proactive working style, with the ability to work in a fast-paced environment with tight deadlines and short production pipeline life-cycles.
- Technical team lead experience (implementation planning, tasks delegation, coordinating with other disciplines, mentoring less experienced developers, etc.) 
- Eagerness for learning new technologies and gaining new skills.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- 10+ years of professional experience in game development.
- Excellent technical background (emphasis is on game engine architecture, performance optimisation and graphics pipeline).
- Excellency either in C++ or C# programming, experience in both.
- Professional experience with Unity game engine and any other C++ commercial or in-house game engine..

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Employment relationship with Ekipa2, d.o.o. (an Outfit7 subsidiary) or Outfit7 Limited for an indefinite period of time, with a six-month probationary period.
- The position is based in Ljubljana (Slovenia) or in Limassol (Cyprus).
- Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
- Participation in attractive projects.
- Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences.
- Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
- Healthy meals in the office.
- Flexible working hours.
- 24 days of paid vacation.
- Participation in a discretionary bonus plan.
- Christmas bonus (subject to internal policies).

Rok za prijavo: 30.03.2026

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
We are looking for a seasoned and skilled Senior Business Development Expert to join our international mobile game development team. As a member of the Business Development department, you will be an expert in establishing, managing, and upgrading our relationships with app stores, publishing platforms, and key industry partners.
In this role, you will use your broad knowledge to influence direction and create innovative solutions that contribute to achieving company goals. We are looking for a professional who can recognize company-wide opportunities and impact our most important projects. We value a solution-oriented mindset and the ability to navigate complex business relations in a results-oriented environment.

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Manage and upgrade company relationships with app stores and publishing platforms to optimize business performance.
- Initiate and manage demanding cross-departmental projects from ideation through execution.
- Recognize company-wide opportunities and provide an analytical perspective to help prioritize work based on business impact.
- Propose the most optimal solutions for challenging situations while keeping business needs and company goals in mind.
- Partner with different business segments, including production, distribution, and sales, to ensure alignment.
- Maintain familiarity with regulatory and legal concerns by working closely with the company’s Legal department.
- Find innovative ways to perform work and propose improvements to tools and workflows as needed.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Being able to understand the “big picture” of the most challenging projects and how they connect with department and company goals.
- Skills to adapt communication styles for various audiences and clearly communicate actionable insights and expert reasoning to company leadership.
- Capability to design project frameworks from scratch and define required project roles.
- The ability to work independently and run projects from start to finish.
- A positive attitude that encourages cooperation, values diverse perspectives, and builds long-term internal and external relationships.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- 5+ years in a growth, business development, store relations, or related domain.
- Prior experience in mobile gaming or managing app store partnerships.
- A track record of taking large-scale projects from start to finish.
- Experience in identifying potential risks, evaluating relevant business factors, and implementing solutions.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Employment relationship with Ekipa2 d.o.o. for an indefinite period of time, with a six-month probationary period.
- Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
- Participation in attractive projects.
- Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences.
- Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
- Healthy meals in the office.
- Flexible working hours.
- 24 days of paid vacation.
- Participation in a discretionary bonus plan.
- Christmas bonus (subject to internal policies).

metadata.value: Marketing

metadata.name: Employment Type
metadata.value: Full-time

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
Where data meets decisions!
Join us as a Senior Marketing Data Scientist and turn complex data into smarter marketing moves. From experimentation frameworks to profitability models, you’ll contribute to success and help shape data-driven marketing at Outfit7.

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Collaborate with Distribution and Product teams to identify opportunities to improve distribution.
- Proactively discover and drive new data-driven approaches to optimize distribution.
- Work on ad hoc projects that support company strategy.
- Present and share new methodologies and best practices internally and externally.
- Build and maintain clean, scalable data pipelines and internal tools that reduce manual work, minimize errors, and enable at-scale optimization.
- Develop robust experimentation frameworks and perform analyses to support profit growth and distribution optimization.
- Communicate insights clearly, challenge outdated practices, and lead pragmatic improvements.
- Optimize data processing workflows to improve efficiency and performance.
- Advise the Marketing team on test design and experimental setups based on data insights.
- Contribute analytical perspectives to discussions and suggest improvements to campaign performance.
- Analyze results from various experiments and tests.
- Implement mathematical models to optimize the performance of Outfit7's marketing campaigns.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to understand data and identify key trends.
- Advanced data analysis skills, particularly in SQL and R or Python.
- Ability to work efficiently in a fast-changing environment.
- Excellent communication and presentation skills; fluent in English (written and spoken).
- Proven ability to structure complex problems, conduct thorough analyses, and generate actionable insights from large datasets.
- Proficiency in reporting and explaining complex results to stakeholders from diverse professional backgrounds.
- Excellent attention to detail and a continuous-improvement mindset.
- A positive, proactive, lead-by-example attitude.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:

- Proficiency in R or Python, primarily for statistical analysis, data manipulation, and visualisation.
- Experience with data analysis, reporting, and monitoring.
- Experience with data-oriented tools, such as SQL; familiarity with DBT is a plus.
- Proven ability to structure complex problems, conduct thorough analyses, and generate actionable insights from large datasets.
- Experience working with teams from different departments.
- Experience in leading a smaller team would be a plus.

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value: We're on the hunt for a Senior Product Manager with deep knowledge of the mobile gaming landscape to lead the implementation of compelling game titles. If you're passionate about game experiences that resonate with players, blending business with creativity, and driving a product's journey from concept to launch, we want you!

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Work efficiently with other teams – GD, UX, Analytics, Marketing, Development, and Art – on a daily basis, researching, and implementing the vision of new and existing games.
- Drive and guide the team regarding which ideas to pursue, using expertise, clear reasoning, and a deep understanding of the market and of the business goals.
- Ensure the delivery of agreed-upon output by setting priorities, maintaining focus, and asking the right product questions.
- Understand the vision of the game, and communicate it clearly to the team and to stakeholders.
- Provide the team with suggestions and solutions for improving ideas and game features.
- Maintain and prioritise the ideas and features backlog.
- Identify and implement ways to improve working practices in the department in order to increase efficiency, focus on the right priorities, and maintain a positive and collaborative atmosphere.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Deep understanding of the mobile games market, including current developments and best practices.
- Ability to understand analytics reports, KPIs, and user research, and use these tools to make informed decisions.
- Ability to independently troubleshoot, prioritise, and address challenges that arise during the product lifecycle.
- Proficiency with tools like JIRA and Trello, or other project management software.
- Excellent ability to balance business, creative needs, timelines, and user experience in the creation of new games.
- Strong communication skills, with fluency in the English language (both written and spoken).
- First-rate interpersonal skills, with the ability to communicate effectively with colleagues and partners.
- Ability to focus on the bigger picture  while simultaneously paying close attention to details.
- Ability to prepare presentations, product specifications, and work on product requirements.
- Passion for mobile games and an excellent understanding of player needs.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Proven experience in launching mobile games in a Product Manager or similar role.
- At least 5 years of experience working in game production (casual mobile games are a plus).
- Knowledge of freemium/free-to-play (F2P) games and various monetization models.
- Experience in cross-departmental collaboration.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Employment relationship with a legal entity within Outfit7 group (taking into consideration the specifics of candidate location and preferences) for an indefinite period of time, with a six-month probationary period.
- Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
- Participation in attractive projects.
- Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences
- Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
- Healthy meals in the office
- Flexible working hours

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value: We're looking for a hands-on Senior System Administrator to lead and evolve our IT infrastructure. You'll guide a small team, set the technical direction, and keep our systems secure, scalable, and reliable. From servers and networks to cloud and endpoint management — you'll be the expert ensuring everything runs smoothly and efficiently.

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Lead and mentor the IT Infrastructure area, providing guidance and setting the technical direction.
- Define and execute an infrastructure strategy that supports the company’s growth, security, and operational goals.
- Manage all core systems, including physical servers, network equipment, virtualization, Wi-Fi infrastructure, and backups.
- Design and maintain secure network setups, including VLANs, firewalls, VPNs, and WiFi (Ruckus, Ubiquiti, or similar).
- Ensure strong cybersecurity practices: patching, access control, backups, and endpoint protection.
- Manage network services such as DHCP, DNS, VPN, and SSO, keeping systems fast, stable, and reliable.
- Experience managing end-user devices (macOS and Windows), familiarity with Kandji and Intune, is a plus.
- Work closely with other teams on projects, integrations, and automation improvements.
- Evaluate and introduce new tools or technologies that improve productivity and scalability.
- Assisting with IT audits (documentation, policies, DRP, DPP, etc.).

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Experience leading a small team and coordinating activities across the whole IT infrastructure area.
- Strong project management skills with a proactive, hands-on mindset.
- Excellent time management and the ability to balance strategy with day-to-day work.
- Solid troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities across multiple platforms.
- Clear communication skills and fluency in English.
- Scripting knowledge — Bash is essential; Python or PowerShell is a plus.
- Strong understanding of IT security principles and practical experience applying them.
- A positive, can-do attitude and the ability to lead by example.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- 5+ years in system administration or infrastructure management.
- Proven experience managing Ubuntu/Linux servers in production environments.
- Comfortable working in mixed macOS and Windows setups.
- Hands-on experience with Kandji (or similar MDM) and Intune (or similar).
- Good networking knowledge (Cisco, Opnsense, Ubiquiti, Ruckus) and firewall management.
- Experience implementing IT security frameworks, policies, or compliance standards.
- Previous experience leading or mentoring IT staff is a big plus
- Familiarity with cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud is an advantage.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Employment relationship with Ekipa2 d.o.o. for an indefinite period of time, with a six-month probationary period.
- Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
- Participation in attractive projects.
- Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences.
- Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
- Healthy meals in the office.
- Flexible working hours.
- 24 days of paid vacation.
- Participation in a discretionary bonus plan.
- Christmas bonus (subject to internal company policies).

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value: Full-funnel UA is your playground, and you know every corner — from big-picture vision to hands-on execution. You live for the challenge of managing and optimizing campaigns, squeezing every ounce of performance from every channel. Data isn’t just numbers to you — it’s the map to your next breakthrough, guiding cross-functional collaboration and sparking ideas that scale. Ready to transform traffic into traction and planning into unstoppable growth? Then get in touch!

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Execute user acquisition (UA) strategies for games at all stages of development, including prototyping, soft launch, and global release — with a focus on titles driven by in-app purchases (IAP) or subscriptions.
- Manage the UA strategy for each product based on its specific goals and lifecycle stage.
- Plan, launch, and optimize UA campaigns to meet key performance indicators (KPIs) and drive scalable growth.
- Collaborate closely with product, creative, and analytics teams to design and execute tests that enhance both user acquisition effectiveness and overall product performance.
- Analyze campaign performance data to uncover insights and continuously improve both UA efficiency and return on investment.
- Stay informed on industry trends, emerging platforms, and market shifts in order to proactively identify opportunities and mitigate potential risks.
- Share knowledge, insights, and best practices across teams to support personal and collective growth in UA capabilities.
- Candidate with experience as a lead would be considered in a hybrid role, also  leading a small team of User Acquisition experts.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Deep understanding of user acquisition strategies and best practices within the mobile app ecosystem.
- Strong passion for performance marketing, with a focus on data-driven growth.
- Analytical mindset with the ability to extract actionable insights, identify trends, and detect anomalies in complex datasets.
- Solid grasp of predictive models such as Lifetime Value (LTV) and Return on Ad Spend (ROAS).
- Skilled at setting clear priorities based on potential impact and business value.
- Strong communication skills, with fluency in English, both written and spoken.
- Nice to have: Ability to manage not only your own responsibilities, but also those of a broader team.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- 5+ years of hands-on experience in user acquisition for in-app purchase (IAP) or subscription-based mobile games or apps.
- Proven track record of managing products through multiple lifecycle stages — from prototype and soft launch to global launch — is a strong advantage.
- Demonstrated success in optimizing campaigns toward Return on Ad Spend (ROAS).
- Experience in managing and scaling campaigns across a variety of channels, including Meta, Google Ads, TikTok, - Apple Search Ads (ASA), and ad networks, and in working with mobile measurement partners (MMPs).
- Familiarity with privacy regulations and data limitations, including experience optimizing campaigns without access to user-level data on post-install events/ROAS.
- Experience in leading a team of other UA experts is a plus, but not a requirement.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Employment relationship with Ekipa2 d.o.o. for an indefinite period of time, with a six-month probationary period.
- Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
- Participation in attractive projects.
- Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences.
- Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
- Healthy meals in the office.
- Flexible working hours.
- 24 days of paid vacation.
- Participation in a discretionary bonus plan.
- Christmas bonus (subject to internal company policies).

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
Would you love to make games enjoyed by hundreds of millions of players around the world?

We’re looking for a software engineer to join our team and help bring Outfit7 mobile games to life. You’ll work on exciting projects, collaborating with a creative, cross-functional team, crafting the features that keep the players coming back for more. If you can combine your technical expertise with strong people skills and a positive, proactive attitude, and you have a passion for delivering high-quality, market-leading games, then we want to hear from you now!

你想亲手打造让全球数亿玩家喜爱的游戏吗？
我们正在招募一名经验丰富的游戏开发人员加入团队，共同将我们的移动游戏变为现实。你将参与令人兴奋的项目，与富有创造力的跨职能团队紧密合作，设计和实现能够吸引玩家持续回归的功能和内容。
如果你既有扎实的技术能力，又具备良好的沟通协作能力和积极主动的态度，并且热衷于打造高质量、引领市场的游戏，我们非常期待你的加入！

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
Implement game features and components in Outfit7 most successful games.
Maintain and improve game code and tools.
Integrate internal libraries.
Collaborate, communicate, and work efficiently within your own team, and across teams throughout the company.
Adjust and deploy Unity games  for the Chinese market.
   


岗位职责：
负责我们最成功游戏的功能与组件实现。
维护并优化游戏代码及工具。
集成内部游戏库。
在团队及跨部门协作中保持高效沟通与合作。
负责中国市场TTF游戏版本的Unity端内容调整与发布。

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills (strong English language skills, both written and spoken, are a plus.)
Positive, make-it-happen, lead-by-example attitude.
Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and to meet deadlines. 
Strong C# development skills and familiarity with Unity.

任职要求：
具备优秀的沟通和人际交往能力，英语书面及口语表达流畅者优先。
积极主动、结果导向、以身作则的工作态度。
能够适应快节奏、动态变化的工作环境并按时完成目标。
熟练掌握C#开发技能, 对 Unity 引擎熟悉。

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
Unity/C# game development experience.
Strong technical background (game development, programming, computer science, etc.)
Experience with C++, various game engines, or shader programming are all pluses.
   
经验要求：
拥有Unity/C#游戏开发经验。
具备扎实的技术背景（游戏开发、编程、计算机科学等）。
有C++、多引擎开发或Shader编写经验者优先。

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
Employment relationship with Outfit7 Network Technology Co., Ltd Shanghai Branch for a fixed term period of three years, with a six-month probationary period and the option to prolong the contract.
Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
Participation in attractive projects.
Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences.
Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
Work-life balance.
Office snacks and coffee
Participation in a discretionary bonus plan
Christmas bonus (subject to internal company policies) 


我们提供

与奥飞特七网络科技有限公司上海分公司签订为期三年的劳动合同，试用期六个月，三年合同期满后可选择续签无限期延长合同。
一个年轻的团队，工作内容多元化，日常带来令人激动的各种挑战，工作环境有趣且轻松。
参与有吸引力的项目。
培训、论坛以及行业会议等职业发展机会。
工作之余提供可选的运动、健身、教育以及娱乐活动。
工作生活平衡。
办公室下午茶。
参与公司绩效奖金计划
圣诞奖金（根据公司内部政策执行）

metadata.name: Publish - Description (Recruiter)
metadata.value: In the UX Designer role, at the intersection of play and usability, you will be responsible for creating intuitive, engaging experiences for the Outfit7 games audience. You will champion the user, translating complex game mechanics into seamless digital journeys. Join the team and design solutions for games that captivate and thrill hundreds of millions of players worldwide!

metadata.name: Publish - Responsibilities (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- Implement the end-to-end game UX, prioritizing features and topics that align with both player delight and business strategy.
- Craft comprehensive user flows and game "overflows" independently, mapping out complex game loops and navigation systems.
- Translate raw data and playtest observations into actionable design iterations, advocating for user insights at every stage of development.
- Design and deliver high-fidelity prototypes, using advanced Figma features, animations, and micro-interactions to convey "game feel" and timing.
- Integrate AI tools into your workflow where they add value: from rapid ideation and asset generation to streamlining repetitive design tasks.
- Analyze competitor games and market trends.
- Collaborate across functions to ensure UX approaches align with brand hierarchy, distribution strategy, and technical feasibility.
- Promote and develop best practices in product design.

metadata.name: Publish - Required Skills (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- A design mindset and understanding of how players interact with games.
- Figma Mastery: Expert-level knowledge of components, auto-layout, and a strong grip on using variables for scalable systems.
- Motion & Prototyping Skills: A keen eye for micro-interactions, timing, and spacing that makes a game feel "juicy" and responsive.
- Analytical & Strategic Thinking: Ability to design for retention, engagement, and business goals.
- Communication: The ability to explain the "why" behind a design choice to stakeholders and developers.
- Adaptability: A proactive approach to learning new tools, including AI-assisted workflows and emerging mobile market trends.
- Fluency in English (written & spoken).

metadata.name: Publish - Required Experience (Recruiter)
metadata.value:
- 3+ years of experience in UX/Product design, preferably in gaming or media, with a portfolio or repository showcasing a clear "problem-to-solution" journey.
- Experience from the gaming space and knowledge of basic cognitive development milestones are a plus.

metadata.name: Pubish - What Do We Offer
metadata.value:
- Employment relationship with a legal entity within Outfit7 group (taking into consideration the specifics of candidate location and preferences) for an indefinite period of time, with a six-month probationary period.
- Diverse work with exciting daily challenges, working as part of a team in a fun, relaxed environment.
- Participation in attractive projects.
- Development opportunities through training, seminars, and conferences.
- Choice of sport, fitness, educational, and entertainment activities outside of work.
- Healthy meals in the office.
- Flexible working hours.
- 24 days of paid vacation.
- Participation in a discretionary bonus plan.
- Christmas bonus (subject to internal policies).
